title: Ludacris, Caviar Ice Cream and Paris Hilton by Boat: Inside the UTA and DoorDash Ads Executive Soirée at Cannes Lions
summary: The agency's biggest Cannes Lions presence ever culminated in a star-studded night at the legendary Hotel du Cap-Eden-Roc, where Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Karlie Kloss and Draymond Green mingled with ad industry heavyweights.
